prompt: Create a full-body studio fashion portrait of a stylish young Japanese female anime-inspired character with a deliberately soft, indistinct face, standing confidently against a clean light gray background. She has a short blunt bob haircut with straight bangs, black hair with vivid purple highlights at the ends, and a slim athletic figure. Her outfit is a futuristic streetwear look: a sheer black cropped high-neck top with short sleeves, a pale metallic band under the bust, visible midriff, an oversized puffy bomber jacket worn off the shoulders in deep purple with a light gray lining, a high-waisted black faux-leather mini skirt with asymmetric wrap panels and a small ring detail at the waist, black thigh-high stockings with garter straps, and chunky white platform lace-up boots. Pose her full length with one hand near the hip, shoulders relaxed, one leg crossing slightly in front of the other, creating a runway-model stance. Use realistic anime character rendering, highly detailed fabric textures, glossy leather, soft nylon jacket folds, clean studio lighting, sharp focus, subtle shadow on the floor, vertical portrait composition, fashionable modern cyber-streetwear mood, no text, no watermark.
